boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot allow release. Source boundary is open due to destination scope mismatch.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 authorizes Peru only, while SHIP-SIE-073 specifies Chile as destination.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Single narrow defect remains: license destination Peru does not match shipment destination Chile. External source correction required before re-verification.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective date (2026-06-28) matches shipment date (2026-06-28), but destination scope authority fails.

critical_features_preserved: end user Andes Labs exact match
destination mismatch identified as sole blocker by both workers and confirmed by Gov
final_answer: Export release ESCALATED. Source boundary cannot close due to unresolved destination scope mismatch. Shipment record SHIP-SIE-073 specifies Chile, while export license LIC-SIE-073 authorizes only Peru. Policy STD-SIE-073-P mandates exact destination match before release. All other fields (ECCN, end-user, dates) match exactly. Release remains blocked until source documents are corrected—either license amended to authorize Chile or shipment record updated to reflect Peru—and re-verified through this process.
open_blockers: destination mismatch: SHIP-SIE-073 destination Chile vs LIC-SIE-073 authorized Peru only. Release blocked until source records corrected to align destination scope.
